name: CE Restore
description: Resets the radio to its factory-flashed default region (CE for CE units, FCC for FCC units). Single frame. Safe undo for FCC mode. Works on all DJI controllers and drones — the CE-restore command is the one DUMPL command that is documented in the dji-firmware-tools project (all FCC unlock apps) and is not license-gated.
source: the dji-firmware-tools DUMPL protocol documentation. Verified on all supported controllers.

frames.note: RADIO reset region to default (dst=ANY idx 1)
